scripts.dev: cross-env HOST=0.0.0.0 BROWSER=none DANGEROUSLY_DISABLE_HOST_CHECK=true WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true TSC_COMPILE_ON_ERROR=true FAST_REFRESH=false PUBLIC_URL=/nostress-web NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --require ./tailwind-resolve-shim.cjs" react-scripts start
scripts.start: cross-env HOST=0.0.0.0 BROWSER=none DANGEROUSLY_DISABLE_HOST_CHECK=true WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true TSC_COMPILE_ON_ERROR=true FAST_REFRESH=false PUBLIC_URL=/nostress-web NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --require ./tailwind-resolve-shim.cjs" react-scripts start
scripts.build: cross-env PUBLIC_URL=/nostress-web SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true TSC_COMPILE_ON_ERROR=true NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --require ./tailwind-resolve-shim.cjs" react-scripts build
scripts.build:prod: cross-env SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true TSC_COMPILE_ON_ERROR=true NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --require ./tailwind-resolve-shim.cjs" react-scripts build
scripts.serve: cross-env PUBLIC_URL=/nostress-web SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true NODE_OPTIONS="--openssl-legacy-provider --require ./tailwind-resolve-shim.cjs" react-scripts start
